other_observers: Janeal Thompson and Dotti Russell both came out to view the bird. Janeal took several photos - one of which I will submit with this report.; I am the finder and identifier - Janeal and Dotti confirmed
specific_location: farm yard 5 miles south of Lamar on hwy 287 and a little over a quarter of a mile to the west
description: -phoebe shape -same size as Eastern Phoebe, a little smaller than a Say's Phoebe -all black except for a white belly and undertail -unmistakeable colorationBehaviors: perched - then sallied for insects - and back to perch behavior same as Eastern and Say's both of which I am familiar withCall: not notedPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp, Janeal Thompson
